name: Neto by Maropost Release Notes – 27 Feb 2020
body: [{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Release Version","bold":true},{"text":": v6.91"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Bug Fixes","bold":true}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue that caused data exports that failed to retry indefinitely."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue that wasn't combining orderlines into higher weight bands for shipping cost calculation."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue with deactivated staff API keys still working in some instances."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue with the Catch integration so that changes to a variation parent product will trigger child products to update."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]}]
